Class CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphic

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.polymorphic.CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphic
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeleteMemberIntent, InsertMemberIntent, MoveMemberIntent, UpdateMemberIntent
public abstract class CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphic extends Object implements Serializable
Abstract base class for all structural Java refinement intents.

This class uses polymorphic JSON mapping to allow the ASI to send a list of different structural operations in a single batch.

Author:
anahata
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • classFqn

      private String classFqn
      The fully qualified name (FQN) of the target class where this intent will be applied. If left null or empty, the intent targets the file-level.

  • Constructor Details

    • CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphic

      public CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphic()

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public abstract void apply(org.netbeans.api.java.source.WorkingCopy wc, Map<Tree, List<Tree>> modifiedMembers, boolean optimize) throws Exception
      Authoritatively applies this intent to the provided working copy.

      Instead of rewriting the WorkingCopy directly, intents update the modifiedMembers map. This map acts as a "Surgery Table" where structural containers (ClassTree, CompilationUnitTree) are mapped to their modified list of child Trees.

      Parameters:
      wc - The active working copy.
      modifiedMembers - The accumulator for all changes in the batch.
      optimize - Whether to optimize imports during this batch.
      Throws:
      Exception - if resolution or AST creation fails.

    • getHtmlDisplay

      public abstract String getHtmlDisplay()
      Returns a human-readable HTML description of the intent for display in the UI.
      Returns:
      A pretty HTML string (e.g., "[+] Insert Field END").

    • getSimpleName

      protected String getSimpleName(String fqn)
      Helper to extract the simple name from a potentially complex FQN.
      Parameters:
      fqn - The FQN to extract the simple name from.
      Returns:
      The simple name of the FQN.
